target.title: feat(autoreview): add pi review engine
target.body:
## Summary
- add `pi` as a supported autoreview engine
- wire the helper to the Pi CLI with `--pi-bin`, Pi thinking levels, and read-only tool mode
- document Pi support and allow the smoke harnesses to accept `pi`

## Details
This uses the local `earendil-works/pi` repo as the reference for Pi's CLI contract. The autoreview helper invokes `pi` in print mode with sessions, context files, extensions, skills, prompt templates, and themes disabled, and uses Pi's built-in read-only tools (`read,grep,find,ls`) when tools are enabled so review stays non-mutating and scoped to inspection.

## Pi CLI isolation contract

Tested against **Pi 0.79.1** (`pi --version`). `run_pi` builds:

```text
pi --print --no-approve --no-session --no-context-files --no-extensions \
   --no-skills --no-prompt-templates --no-themes \
   [--model X] [--thinking Y] \
   [--tools read,grep,find,ls | --no-tools]
```

| Flag | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `--no-approve` | Ignore project-local trust-gated files for this run (Pi docs: non-interactive mode can otherwise use saved/global trust) |
| `--no-session` | Ephemeral run; no session persistence |
| `--no-context-files` | Skip AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md discovery |
| `--no-extensions` / `--no-skills` / `--no-prompt-templates` / `--no-themes` | Disable project resource loading |
| `--tools read,grep,find,ls` | Read-only built-in tools only (default when tools enabled) |

Maintainers: merge assumes supported Pi versions honor these flags as documented in `pi --help`.

## Validation

```bash
$ ruby scripts/validate-skills
validated 5 skills

$ python3 skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --engine pi --thinking high --pi-bin pi --dry-run
engine: pi
thinking: high

$ python3 skills/autoreview/scripts/test-review-harness.py --fixture malicious --engine pi
autoreview findings: 3
overall: patch is incorrect (0.95)
# harness exited 0 with structured findings
```

Also: `python3 -m py_compile`, `bash -n test-review-harness`, harness allow-list updates.

## Related PRs
- Droid reasoning-effort runtime: #16
- Model/thinking docs (main engines): #17
